{{Quote|Sometimes the smallest fights become the biggest battles.|Sev, to Joc Sah|<ref name="TOoO" />}}
'''Sev''' was a [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served as a [[Jedi General/Legends|general]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. During the war, he [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Joc Sah]] as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]. In the war's [[19 BBY/Legends|final year]], Sev and Sah were sent to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ragmar V]], which was considered an essential staging world for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] planned attack on a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] base.

Sev remained aboard a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] and sent Sah on his first solo mission to secure an outpost on the surface. Shortly thereafter, the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] under Sev's command were ordered by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to execute [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], a [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|directive]] branding the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] traitors to the Republic. Sev defended himself briefly, but was eventually [[Death/Legends|slain]] by the [[Cloning/Legends|clones]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Master Sev -- the clones have turned on me! Come on! Master -- Do you copy?|Padawan Joc Sah tries to contact his master, who was killed after Order 66|<ref name="TOoO" />}}
[[File:Joc.jpg|left|thumb|250px|Master Sev is talking to his apprentice, Joc Sah]]
Sev, a [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], was born during the final [[Time/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and eventually ascended to the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. During this [[Time/Legends|time]], he took the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Joc Sah]] as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]].<ref name="TOoO" /> When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|began]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones">{{Film|II}}</ref> Sev served as a [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], the final [[Standard year/Legends|year]] of the war, Sev and Sah were dispatched to [[Ragmar V]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], which was viewed as a vital staging world for a planned Republic assault on a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] base. Sev stayed aboard a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] and sent Sah, accompanied by [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|Clone Sergeant]] [[Remy (clone trooper)|Remy]] and a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Squad/Legends|squad]], on his first solo mission to the surface of the planet.<ref name="TOoO" />

[[File:Sev_66.jpg|right|thumb|250px|Master Sev became a victim of Order 66]]
As Sah and his [[Troop/Legends|troops]] entered the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], Sev ordered him to secure an outpost and warned his Padawan to remain on his guard. Shortly thereafter, the [[Sev's ARC trooper|ARC trooper]] accompanying Sev received a [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|directive]] from [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] commanding him to execute [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], which labeled the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] traitors to the Republic. Sev was attacked by the [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] under his command but defeated many of them before being overwhelmed and [[Death/Legends|killed]]. After the Jedi Master's death, the ARC [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] sent a detachment of clones to eliminate Sah, who defeated his clone squad.<ref name="TOoO" />

==Personality and traits==
Sev cautioned Joc Sah, his Padawan learner, to remain on guard during the mission to Ragmar V, warning him that a seemingly minor fight could erupt into a large battle. Sev had dark skin, black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and brown [[Hair/Legends|hair]].<ref name="TOoO" />

==Powers and abilities==
Sev was powerful enough to achieve the rank of Jedi Master. He was also skilled in using his lightsaber during combat, eliminating multiple clone troopers before he was overwhelmed and slain.<ref name="TOoO" />

==Equipment==
As a Jedi, he wore [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Jedi apparel/Legends|Jedi robes]]<ref name="TOoO" /> and used a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] containing a green [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|crystal]].<ref name="Figure">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection|text=''Star Wars: Order 66'' (Series 2)|pack=#6: Master Sev & ARC Trooper|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/tacOrder66-6.asp}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:TAC08order666T22.jpg|thumb|right|150px|A realistic interpretation of Sev]]
Sev was introduced in the short story ''[[The Order of Outcasts]]'', which was one of four stories compiled in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 5|fifth volume]] of the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']] [[Star Wars comic books|trade paperbacks]]. The character was created by [[Matt Jacobs]] and drawn by [[Matthew Fillbach|Matthew]] and [[Shawn Fillbach]].<ref name="TOoO" />

In [[2008]], [[Hasbro]] created an action figure of both Sev and the ARC trooper under his command as part of the second wave of the Order 66 release of the ''[[Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection]]'' toy line. Sev's figure comes with a green lightsaber.<ref name="Figure" />

==Appearances==
